seoTitle: Sutton vs Sutton Grange — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Sutton and Sutton Grange. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Sutton vs Sutton Grange: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Sutton and Sutton Grange.
heading: Sutton vs Sutton Grange — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Sutton, Victoria and Sutton Grange, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Sutton has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Sutton Grange (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Sutton or Sutton Grange safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Sutton has a flood risk score of 30/100, while Sutton Grange scores 42/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Sutton scores 39/100 for bushfire risk. Sutton Grange scores 50/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Sutton or Sutton Grange?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Sutton has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.8% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
